catalyst.event: 2026 H1 earnings report — first hard print on 1.6T ramp magnitude, gross margin trajectory, and Q2 sequential revenue
catalyst.source: Standard A-share semi-annual reporting window; exact date not in our data

rightIf_conditions: PASS direction proves right if: 2026 H1 consolidated gross margin <45% @ 2026 H1 报告 (~2026-08-20) | source: 2026 H1 合并利润表: (营业收入-营业成本)/营业收入 | if_not_disclosed: INSUFFICIENT_DISCLOSURE
PASS direction proves right if: Q2 2026 single-quarter revenue <15.0B CNY @ 2026 H1 报告 (~2026-08-20) | source: 2026 H1 合并利润表 Q2单季: 营业收入 | if_not_disclosed: INSUFFICIENT_DISCLOSURE

PASS direction proves right if: stock price between 850 and 1150 CNY @ 2026-08-31 close | source: 交易所收盘价 | if_not_disclosed: INSUFFICIENT_DISCLOSURE (i.e., range-bound, no asymmetric move materializes)
wrongIf_conditions: PASS proves wrong (should have been LONG) if: 2026 H1 consolidated gross margin ≥47% @ 2026 H1 报告 (~2026-08-20) | source: 2026 H1 合并利润表: (营业收入-营业成本)/营业收入 | if_not_disclosed: INSUFFICIENT_DISCLOSURE
PASS proves wrong (should have been LONG) if: Q2 2026 single-quarter net income ≥5.5B CNY @ 2026 H1 报告 (~2026-08-20) | source: 2026 H1 合并利润表 Q2单季: 净利润 | if_not_disclosed: INSUFFICIENT_DISCLOSURE
PASS proves wrong (should have been SHORT) if: stock price ≤750 CNY @ 2026-08-31 close | source: 交易所收盘价 | if_not_disclosed: INSUFFICIENT_DISCLOSURE
what_changes_our_mind: 2026 H1 report: consolidated gross margin >45% AND Q2 single-quarter revenue ≥15B CNY → re-engage LONG with starter size; OR GM <40% / Q2 rev <12B / 1.6T delay disclosure → re-engage SHORT.
variant_view_one_sentence: Market believes 1.6T cycle delivers a 5-6x 2026 EPS jump justifying price above analyst mean → We believe this is an [E3:narrative] claim with no [E1] verification possible until H1 2026 prints, and positioning is too crowded for asymmetric edge in either direction → Mechanism is: wait for the segment/margin data the broker reports assume but our data lacks.

expected_pnl_asymmetry.downside_if_wrong: 0% to -10% (opportunity cost if stock rips to 1200-1500 on H1 beat)
expected_pnl_asymmetry.reward_to_risk: n/a (PASS — explicit non-bet pending H1 print)

quantification.metric_target: PASS — no directional price target issued

core_causal_link.link_sentence: The 1.6T cycle delivers 2026 EPS in the 50-65 CNY range (vs 2025's 9.71) — this is the load-bearing claim for the LONG, and the absence of any segment/product-level data means it can only be sourced from broker narrative.
core_causal_link.tier_justification: Source is exclusively broker reports (西部证券, 长江证券, 国盛, 中信建投) — forensic flagged bull's '65 CNY EPS' as MISMATCH (field is target price, not EPS). SEGMENT ECONOMICS returned no rows (fina_mainbz not available). To reach [E1:direct] we would need: (a) product-line revenue/margin disclosure for 800G vs 1.6T, OR (b) H1 2026 consolidated GM ≥45% + Q2 rev ≥15B as proxy print. Neither exists yet.

pass_reason_detail: Live price 1049.87 vs analyst mean target 873.33 = -16.8% downside to consensus already; bull predicted_value 1500 requires 2026 EPS ~50-60 CNY (a >5x jump from 2025's 9.71) which is [E3:narrative] from broker target-price fields (forensic MISMATCH on EPS=65.74 claim — that figure is a target price, not EPS), unverifiable without segment disclosure (fina_mainbz no rows). Reward:risk to upside ≈ +43% vs downside to mean target -17% ≈ 2.5:1 numerically but the upside leg is E3-only while downside leg is E1+E4 (crowded leveraged-long 99.6%, insider NET_SELL_HIGH, RSI 85, 92% of 52W range) — risk-adjusted R:R collapses below 1.5:1. SHORT side equally weak: no [E1:direct] evidence of 1.6T delay, hyperscaler CapEx cut, or margin contraction in our data — only valuation/positioning. Unresolved observable: 2026 H1 报告 (~2026-08-20) consolidated gross margin and Q2 single-quarter revenue, which neither side can pre-position on with [E1] base.
